title: Better Vanilla
description: Vanilla but better! This simple Minecraft modpack offers many performance, graphics & quality of life improvements that make playing the game in singleplayer or multiplayer more fun.
body:
# Better Vanilla

## About

Vanilla but better! This simple Minecraft modpack offers many performance, graphics & quality of life improvements that make playing the game in singleplayer or multiplayer more fun.

This modpack is designed to enhance the client-side and therefore does not require any server-side dependencies.

## Credits

### Resource Pack

- [Stay True](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) (by haimcyfly)
